summary: Website for Sandharka Green English Boarding School, established in 2063 B.S., located in Sandharka-2, Arghakhanchi, Nepal. The school has 1500+ students and 55+ teachers.

generatedImages.description: Realistic wide-angle photograph of Sandharka Green English Boarding School in Arghakhanchi, Nepal, with students, teachers, green campus, and Nepal flag.

existing_features.title: Create a multi-section school website for 'Sandharka Green English Boarding School' (Estd. 2063 B.S.) located in Sandharka-2, Arghakhanchi, Nepal. The site must include: a Hero section with the school name, tagline, and establishment year; an About section with details about the school's history and location; a Stats section highlighting 1500+ students and 55+ teachers; a Facilities/Features section; a Notice/Announcements section; a Gallery section; and a Contact section with the school's address.

Apply a nature-inspired green and white visual theme throughout the website, reflecting the school's green campus identity. Use deep forest green and clean white as primary colors, with earthy accent tones. Use a professional, school-brochure style layout with elegant serif headings and clean sans-serif body text. Ensure consistent spacing, subtle section dividers, and a polished academic look.

Display the generated school campus image (sandharka_green_english_boarding_school.jpg) as a full-width hero background on the landing page. Also use it in the Gallery or About section as a showcase image.
Implement a simple Notices/Announcements backend that stores school notices (title, content, date). The frontend should fetch and display the latest notices in a dedicated section on the website.

Replace the existing generated campus image (sandharka_green_english_boarding_school.jpg) used in the Hero background, About section, Gallery section, and Contact section with the newly uploaded real school photo (FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg). Use this actual photograph of Sandharka Green English Boarding School campus wherever the old generated image was previously displayed.

Add the newly uploaded school photo FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg as a second real campus image. Display it alongside FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg in the Gallery section so the gallery features at least two distinct real photographs of the school campus.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a school website for Sandharka Green English Boarding School
